<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Wrap an IndexedDB request as a one-shot source.

## Import

```ts
import { fromIDBRequest } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fromIDBRequest(request: IDBRequestLike<T>): Operator<never, T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `request` | `IDBRequestLike<T>` | Request value to lower, route, or record. |

## Returns

A Operator<never, T> value for the boundary or adapter.

## Example

```ts
import { fromIDBRequest } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/sources/browser.ts`
